name: Flaming Cappuccino
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse glass with hot water and dry.
2. Dip the rim of the glass in lemon juice, then in sugar, creating a quarter-inch band of sugar around the top of the glass.
3. Rotate the glass over the flame of an Irish coffee burner or alcohol burner until the sugar crystallizes on the glass.
4. Pour 2 tablespoons Galliano into the glass.
5. Rotate over the flame until the liqueur ignites.
6. Fill with coffee to about one-half inch from the top of the glass, then stir in 1 tablespoon chocolate syrup.
7. Top the flaming Cappuccino with whipped cream and garnish with a cinnamon stick.
8. Repeat the procedure for each serving.
